title: AI Product Engineer (Agents)
company_stage: Series A/B (backed by leading investors, growing fast)
company_focus:
AI platforms for building no-code AI agents for professional
teams
description:
V7

At V7, we’re building AI platforms that help humans do their
best work, at incredible scale and speed. Our mission is to
turn human knowledge into trustworthy AI, making complex
tasks faster, smarter, and more accurate. We’re growing
fast, backed by leading investors and AI pioneers (including
the minds behind Transformers and Gemini).

The Product you'll be working on

V7 Go provides legal, finance, insurance, and accounting
teams with a toolkit for deploying and building custom no-
code AI agents. The platform focuses taking multi-modal data
and delivering verifiable outputs with transparent AI logic
to ensure accuracy and compliance.

V7 Go supports all of the latest models like GPT-5, Claude
4.1, and Gemini 2.5 for the best accuracy and
performance.⁠⁠⁠⁠ Watch the V7 Go keynote to see what we’re
building.

The team you'll be joining and the impact you'll have

- Join a small, high-performing AI team pushing the boundaries
  of what our platform can achieve

- Your code will directly impact how thousands of customers
  solve real-world challenges with AI
- High-ownership, low-process environment where your problem-
  solving skills scale our AI capabilities
- Build agents, tune models, and ship AI solutions that power
  our entire platform

What you'll be doing from day one:

- Build LLM agents for document understanding, search, and
  image recognition that go from prototype to production
  fast
- Write clean, tested Python code that scales - no research
  papers, just working AI features
- Collaborate with AI and product teams to iterate on
  solutions that customers actually use
- Juggle multiple projects with high ownership using LangGraph
  and cutting-edge AI frameworks

Who you are

- 2+ years building production LLM apps with deep knowledge of
  APIs, prompt engineering, and RAG
- Python expert who writes clean, production-ready code with a
  CS/engineering degree to back it up
- Natural problem-solver who can explain complex AI challenges
  to anyone, from engineers to executives
- Pragmatic builder over academic researcher - you ship
  working solutions fast and love using tools like LangGraph

V7 champions equality and inclusion because diverse teams
build better products. Don't check every box? Apply anyway —
we value what makes you unique and will support you through
the process, just let our Talent team know how they can
help.
responsibilities: Build LLM agents for document understanding, search, and image recognition from prototype to production
Write clean, tested Python code that scales for working AI features
Collaborate with AI and product teams to iterate on customer-facing solutions
Manage multiple projects using LangGraph and cutting-edge AI frameworks
Build agents, tune models, and ship AI solutions that power the entire platform
Work with multi-modal data to deliver verifiable outputs with transparent AI logic
use_cases: Document understanding and processing for legal, finance, insurance, and accounting teams
Multi-modal AI search across enterprise data
Image recognition integrated into agent workflows
No-code AI agent deployment for non-technical professional users
Verifiable AI outputs with transparent logic for compliance and accuracy
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role is directly building, deploying, and tuning LLM
agents and AI solutions. The engineer will use LangGraph and
cutting-edge AI frameworks to build agents for document
understanding, search, and image recognition, going from
prototype to production. This is hands-on work with models
and agents, not supporting infrastructure.
